DOC-001.text: Fuel convoy routing is delayed 36 hours due to washouts near corridor DELTA, with alternate route assessment underway.

DOC-002.text: Depot maintenance backlog decreased after spare-part allocation was rebalanced across regional hubs.

DOC-003.text: A secure transport manifest references CORVUS tasking for priority movement windows in sector nine.

DOC-004.text: Model testing indicates improved retrieval precision for conflict early-warning analyses.

DOC-005.text: Supplier readiness checks show moderate risk of delayed deliveries for thermal camera components.

DOC-006.text: SIGINT indicates IRONGATE relay traffic increased around SV-9900 between 0200 and 0400 local.

DOC-007.text: An intercept notes PRISM ECHO references tied to a mobile antenna handoff protocol.

DOC-008.text: Imagery shows VESPER support vehicles repositioned near a suspected collection platform.

DOC-009.text: Latest satellite revisit confirms transient equipment staging with probable command-and-control adaptation.
